creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
Created attachment 213364
Console output from PPSSPP-1.9.4

I've installed port emulators/ppsspp on FreeBSD-12.1 on AMD64 via pkg (-> "pkg install ppsspp"). Command pkg installed latest version 1.9.4.
But when I try to start it, a new frame for PPSSPP occurs, but it is closed very soon automatically, and a core dump is written.

See attachment for console output including errors.
